roa.docketEntryComment: Bench Warrant Issued
Warrant Discharged
ORDER SUSPENDING ACTIVE COLLECTIONS, GC 25259,7-25259,95
PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/CAL:MOTION TO MODIFY SENTENCE/CTORD:THE COMMITMENT ORDERED ON 11-9-09 ISORDERED RECALLED AND VACATED/PROB MOD:AS TO COUNT 1 AND 2, DEFENDANT IS TOSERVE 38 DAYS IN THE COUNTY JAIL AND IS TO RECEIVE 38 DAYS CREDIT FOR TIMESERVED/DEF:SETENCE IS DEEMED SERVED AS TO THIS CASE/

/X:AS TO COUNT 1, THE FOLLOWING SENTENCE IS IMPOSED,/TWS/CH1:CJ 1Y/CTS:10/VF1/SECFEE/ICNA/COLLECT/X:AS TO COUNT 2, THE FOLLOWING SENTENCE IS IMPOSED,/CH2:CJ 6M/CTS:10/CCC:EACH COUNT AND CASE #2361157/PF390/X:THE COURT SECURITY, ICNA, AND VIF FEES ARE ALSO IMPOSED AS TO COUNT 2,/BE/X:23593(A) VCADMONITION GIVEN,/SAORD/SA2:1315 UNION STREET/SAORD3/CONTD SURRENDER/CONTD:DEFENDANT TO SURRENDER IN OPEN COURT/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MISDRED1:1/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PER WVS CONST & CITZRTS ENT PLEA OF G AND NL/DEFT ADV RTS:1/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATEDDISPOSITION/REMA/
/CAL FINAL TO SET/FTA/BF/BWI/SURETY/BFORF HEARING ON FINAL TO SET/BFORF226,100/BAIL:50,000/X:DO NOT CITE/BWNUM:1ST/X:3 OF 4 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/ /DEF:MUST TURN HIMSELF IN/
/CAL:SURRENDER TO COURT/SHER/SHER2:01-13-10/DEF:IS TO SERVE HIS PREVIOUSLY IMPOSED SENTENCE/ADDL CTS:5/BE/
/CAL:SURRENDER TO COURT/NP/DEF:IS ILL/4011,5/CONT/
/CAL:ERP/CONTD:  PRELIM HEARING/DOP     /
/CAL:PTC (ERP)/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET/CONTD:EARLY RESOLUTION PROGRAM ON 10-30-09 IN DEPT, 23/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 11-09-09 IN DEPT, 12/DOP/
/CAL:FTA HRG FINAL TS, 1ST BWI/BWDC1:2 /BWCTS:2/CTORD:BAIL REMAINS AT $50,000/CONTD:TO SET/
/CAL:PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:FINAL TO SET/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET/CONTD:PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET/CONT/DOP/
